title: InferenceRule
description: A SPARQL CONSTRUCT rule that materializes derived triples in the OpenMetadata knowledge graph (e.g. transitive lineage, PII propagation, tag inheritance).

name.description: Stable identifier for the rule (used as primary key). Lowercase letters, digits, hyphen.

description.description: What the rule does and why it is enabled. Markdown.

ruleType.description: Body language. CONSTRUCT is a SPARQL CONSTRUCT query that produces new triples. RDFS is a placeholder for future Jena-RDFS rule format.

ruleBody.description: The rule body. For ruleType=CONSTRUCT, a SPARQL CONSTRUCT query that emits the inferred triples.

enabled.description: Whether the rule is currently active. Disabled rules are loaded but not applied.

priority.description: Execution order hint. Lower numbers run first. Rules at the same priority run in name order.

tags.description: Free-form labels (e.g. 'lineage', 'security', 'governance') for filtering in admin UI.
